creator: cshumway@titan-project.org
text:
The ndc manpage for 'ndc stats' says that the status file will be dumped
in /var/tmp/named.stats.  The real location for named.stats after 'ndc
stats' is /etc/namedb/named.stats

Fix: 

Change the manual page /usr/share/man/man8/ndc.8.gz to reflect the proper 
locateion of named.stats
How-To-Repeat: 
ndc stats
named.stats should be dumped in /etc/namedb/named.stats
